enriched_metadata.display_name: Bank Marketing Dataset - Term Deposit Subscription Prediction
enriched_metadata.objective: Predict whether a client will subscribe to a term deposit based on direct marketing campaign data from a Portuguese banking institution
enriched_metadata.sources: Portuguese bank marketing campaign data (Moro et al. 2014) - UCI Machine Learning Repository
enriched_metadata.features_description: 16 client and campaign attributes: demographic data (age, job, marital status, education), financial data (default, balance, housing/personal loans), campaign data (contact type, duration, number of contacts), and previous campaign outcomes
enriched_metadata.representativity_description: Data from direct telephone marketing campaigns of a Portuguese banking institution conducted between May 2008 and November 2010, representing real-world marketing campaign scenarios
enriched_metadata.sample_balance_description: Highly imbalanced dataset with approximately 11.3% positive cases (term deposit subscriptions) and 88.7% negative cases, reflecting realistic marketing campaign success rates
enriched_metadata.missing_values_description: No missing values reported - complete data for all client and campaign attributes
enriched_metadata.data_errors_description: High-quality dataset with no missing values or data quality issues reported
